translations.en: The mayor is coming this evening.
translations.pt: O prefeito vem hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Thị trưởng sẽ đến tối nay.
translations.hi: महापौर आज शाम आ रहे हैं.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the noun 'maire' and marking definiteness for the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase referring to the mayor.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; predicates the action performed by the subject.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir' to form a temporal NP ('this evening').
Common noun; part of the temporal noun phrase 'ce soir' functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: Tu connais le maire de la ville.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ lə mɛʁ də la vil/

translations.fr: Tu connais le maire de la ville.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ lə mɛʁ də la vil/
translations.en: You know the mayor of the city.
translations.es: Conoces al alcalde de la ciudad.
translations.de: Du kennst den Bürgermeister der Stadt.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识这座城市的市长。
translations.pt: Você conhece o prefeito da cidade.
translations.vi: Bạn biết thị trưởng của thành phố.
translations.nl: Jij kent de burgemeester van de stad.
translations.hi: तुम शहर के महापौर को जानते हो.
translations.id: Kamu mengenal wali kota kota ini.
translations.ja: あなたはその町の市長を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the object noun 'maire'.
Common noun; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition introducing a genitive-like complement ('de la ville') modifying 'maire'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'ville'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de' specifying which mayor ('of the city').

sentences.target: On écrit au maire pour la route.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ekʁi o mɛʁ puʁ la ʁut/

translations.fr: On écrit au maire pour la route.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ekʁi o mɛʁ puʁ la ʁut/
translations.en: We’re writing to the mayor about the road.
translations.es: Estamos escribiendo al alcalde sobre la carretera.
translations.de: Wir schreiben dem Bürgermeister wegen der Straße.
translations.it: Stiamo scrivendo al sindaco riguardo alla strada.
translations.ko: 우리는 도로에 관해 시장에게 편지를 쓰고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在就道路问题给市长写信。
translations.yue: 我哋為條路嘅事寫信畀市長。
translations.ru: Мы пишем мэру по поводу дороги.
translations.pt: Estamos escrevendo ao prefeito sobre a estrada.
translations.he: אנחנו כותבים לראש העיר לגבי הכביש.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang viết cho thị trưởng về con đường.
translations.ar: نحن نكتب إلى رئيس البلدية بشأن الطريق.
translations.nl: We schrijven naar de burgemeester over de weg.
translations.hi: हम सड़क के बारे में महापौर को लिख रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Piszemy do burmistrza w sprawie drogi.
translations.el: Γράφουμε στον δήμαρχο για τον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Vi skriver til ordføreren om veien.
translations.id: Kami sedang menulis kepada wali kota tentang jalan.
translations.sv: Vi skriver till borgmästaren om vägen.
translations.da: Vi skriver til borgmesteren om vejen.
translations.ja: 道路の件で市長に手紙を書いています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun; subject, generic or colloquial 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); selects prepositional complements.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' with the masculine article 'le'; introduces the indirect object noun 'maire'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au' (indirect object).
Preposition introducing a purpose or beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'route'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour' specifying the purpose/context.

sentences.target: Nous attendons le maire devant l'école.

translations.fr: Nous attendons le maire devant l'école.
translations.en: We’re waiting for the mayor in front of the school.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al alcalde frente a la escuela.
translations.de: Wir warten vor der Schule auf den Bürgermeister.
translations.it: Stiamo aspettando il sindaco davanti alla scuola.
translations.ko: 우리는 학교 앞에서 시장을 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在学校门口等市长。
translations.yue: 我哋喺學校門口等市長。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o prefeito em frente à escola.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים לראש העיר מול בית הספר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi thị trưởng trước cổng trường.
translations.ar: نحن ننتظر رئيس البلدية أمام المدرسة.
translations.nl: We wachten op de burgemeester voor de school.
translations.hu: Az iskola előtt várjuk a polgármestert.
translations.hi: हम स्कूल के सामने महापौर का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε τον δήμαρχο μπροστά από το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Vi venter på ordføreren foran skolen.
translations.id: Kami menunggu wali kota di depan sekolah.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på borgmästaren framför skolan.
translations.ro: Îl așteptăm pe primar în fața școlii.
translations.da: Vi venter på borgmesteren foran skolen.
translations.ja: 私たちは学校の前で市長を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the object noun 'maire'.
Common noun; direct object of 'attendons'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; determiner introducing 'école'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'devant', completing the locative phrase.
